services.label: Services
services.title: What I Build for Business
services.subtitle: Solutions that translate technical complexity into measurable business value — deployed and maintained with enterprise-grade reliability.
services.cloud_desc: Migrate your organization to Microsoft 365 and Azure. Modern identity management with Entra ID, automated device lifecycle with Intune & Autopilot, and enterprise-grade security — without the overhead.
services.apps_desc: Purpose-built Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) that replace manual processes with fast, installable, multilingual digital systems. From logistics tracking to facility management — built to score 100/100 on performance.
services.apps_case: → Case: Dnamar Facility Services — real-time operations platform across 4 languages.
services.network_desc: Enterprise network design for multi-site businesses: VLAN segmentation, VPN configuration, DNS/DHCP, and hybrid identity — ensuring every team stays connected and every device stays inside your security perimeter.

hero.availability_swiss: Immediate availability across Switzerland and Liechtenstein
hero.title: IT Solutions Engineer:
hero.subtitle: Turning technical complexity into measurable business value — Cloud Transformation, Custom Business Apps, and Hybrid Networking for enterprises across Switzerland and Liechtenstein.
hero.collaboration: Open to individual projects and collective collaborations.

certifications.label: Certifications & Expertise
certifications.title: Verified Guarantees of Quality
certifications.subtitle: Each certification is a commitment: the skills behind your project are formally validated — not self-declared.
certifications.ccna_title: CCNA Discovery: Introducing Routing and Switching in the Enterprise
certifications.ccna_guarantee: Your network infrastructure is designed, secured, and documented by a Cisco-certified professional.
certifications.ccna_desc: Formal certification in enterprise network design, switching, routing, and security. Your multi-site connectivity, VLAN architecture, and VPN tunnels are built on industry-standard protocols — not trial and error.
certifications.ai_issuer: BIG school · Brais Moure & Romuald Fons
certifications.ai_guarantee: Your workflows are automated and your apps are built faster — using cutting-edge AI tooling from day one.
certifications.ai_desc: Specialized training in AI-assisted development and workflow automation by Spain's top tech educators. Applied to real projects: faster delivery cycles, smarter code generation, and full-stack systems that adapt.
certifications.ecommerce_guarantee: Your digital presence is technically sound and optimized for search visibility and conversion.
certifications.ecommerce_desc: End-to-end expertise in e-commerce platforms (PrestaShop, Joomla), MySQL/PhpMyAdmin database management, and SEO/conversion optimization. Your online business runs on infrastructure that actually performs.
certifications.trust_title: Skills validated across Infrastructure, Development & AI
certifications.trust_subtitle: Covering the full technical spectrum — from network layer to user interface.

stack.title: Technology Stack
stack.subtitle: Enterprise-grade expertise — from hybrid identity to cloud-native automation.

experience.subtitle: Enterprise IT delivery across multi-national environments.

roles.title: Technical Support Specialist & Systems Administrator

Administered Microsoft 365 and Active Directory environments
Network troubleshooting: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLAN, VPN

highlights: 1st-level IT support in ITIL-based enterprise environment
Incident management, SLA tracking, and user account administration
Microsoft 365 application support and remote troubleshooting

roles.title: Systems & Network Engineer

Managed virtualization environments and system monitoring
Provided infrastructure support across multiple client sites

roles.title: Web Developer & Application Support
highlights: Built and maintained web applications with MySQL database backends
Provided technical support and troubleshooting for deployed systems

roles.title: Fiber Optic & Datacenter Technician
highlights: Deployed fiber and copper cabling infrastructure in datacenters
Rack installation and network infrastructure maintenance
